YUWANCARD-PIG_DOUBT_POWER.title: Pig Doubt
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_POWER.title: Rain Dark
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_POWER.description: Energy gained is doubled. Draw up to hand limit (10). Heal 6 HP after combat.
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_POWER.smartDescripti: Energy gained is doubled. Draw up to hand limit (10). Heal 6 HP after combat. Lasts for {Amount} turns.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY_POWER.title: Pig Bankruptcy
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY_POWER.descripti: All cards in hand cost 0 this turn, but they all have Exhaust.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY_POWER.smartDesc: All cards in hand cost 0 this turn, but they all have Exhaust.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD_POWER.title: Pig Brain Overload
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD_POWER.descr: Every 2 turns, gain 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold]. Upgraded: every 3 turns.
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG_POWER.title: You Are Pig
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG_POWER.description: You have turned into a pig.
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG_POWER.smartDescrip: You are a pig. Lasts for {Duration} turns.
YUWANCARD-VAKUU_TAKEOVER_POWER.title: Vakuu Takeover
YUWANCARD-VAKUU_TAKEOVER_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, Vakuu will automatically play cards from your hand.
YUWANCARD-VAKUU_TAKEOVER_POWER.smartDesc: At the start of your turn, Vakuu will automatically play cards from your hand. Lasts for {Duration} turns.
YUWANCARD-TRAIN_YOU_WELL_POWER.title: Train You Well
YUWANCARD-PIG_CHARGE_POWER.title: Pig Charge Power
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS_POWER.title: Pig Friends
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS_POWER.description: When gained, summon a [gold]Pig Minion[/gold]. Every 3 stacks, the pig is upgraded.
YUWANCARD-PIG_FRIENDS_POWER.smartDescrip: When gained, summon a Pig Minion. Every 3 stacks, upgrade it.
YUWANCARD-PIG_MINION_POWER.title: Pig Minion
YUWANCARD-PIG_MINION_POWER.description: Absorb all unblocked attack damage meant for owner. When owner gains Block, gain {BonusBlock} Block. Pig's Strength is added to owner's attack damage. When owner gains Strength, pig gains 1 Strength. At the start of each turn, give all players 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_MINION_POWER.smartDescript: Absorbs all unblocked attack damage for owner. Gains {BonusBlock} Block when owner gains Block. Strength added to owner's attacks. Gains 1 Strength when owner gains Strength.
YUWANCARD-PERFECT_THING_POWER.title: Perfect Thing
YUWANCARD-PERFECT_THING_POWER.descriptio: Gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold] every certain number of cards you play. Upgraded: fewer cards.
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG_POWER.title: Hacker Pig
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG_POWER.description: Automatically play marked cards at the start of your turn.
YUWANCARD-HACKER_PIG_POWER.smartDescript: Automatically play marked cards at the start of your turn.
YUWANCARD-BLOOD_WHEEL_EYE_POWER.title: Blood Wheel Eye
YUWANCARD-BLOOD_WHEEL_EYE_POWER.descript: All cards gain Replay 1 this combat.
YUWANCARD-BLOOD_WHEEL_EYE_POWER.smartDes: All cards gain Replay {ReplayCount} this combat.
YUWANCARD-PIG_DEFECTION_POWER.title: Pig Defection
YUWANCARD-PIG_VAMPIRIC_POWER.title: Pig Vampiric
YUWANCARD-PIG_VAMPIRIC_POWER.description: Whenever you play an Attack card, heal 1 HP.
YUWANCARD-PIG_VAMPIRIC_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you play an Attack card, heal {PigVampiricPower:diff()} HP.
YUWANCARD-PIG_COIN_POWER.title: Pig Coin
YUWANCARD-PIG_COIN_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card, gain 3 Gold.
YUWANCARD-PIG_COIN_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you play a card, gain {PigCoinPower:diff()} Gold.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BURGER_POWER.title: Pig Burger
YUWANCARD-PIG_BURGER_POWER.description: At the end of combat, heal 6 HP.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BURGER_POWER.smartDescript: At the end of combat, heal {PigBurgerPower:diff()} HP.
YUWANCARD-KILLING_INTENT_POWER.title: Killing Intent
YUWANCARD-KILLING_INTENT_POWER.descripti: Your next X Attacks deal extra damage.
YUWANCARD-TRAGIC_MANDARIN_DUCK_POWER.des: At the end of your turn, if you didn't play any Attack, lose Strength and Dexterity, deal damage to all enemies.
YUWANCARD-TRAGIC_MANDARIN_DUCK_POWER.sma: At the end of your turn, if you didn't play any Attack, lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold], deal {Damage} damage to all enemies.
YUWANCARD-EMPERORS_NEW_PIG_POWER.title: Emperor's New Pig
YUWANCARD-EMPERORS_NEW_PIG_POWER.descrip: Enemies cannot deal damage to you.
YUWANCARD-EMPERORS_NEW_PIG_POWER.smartDe: Enemies cannot deal damage to you. Lasts for {Amount} turns.
YUWANCARD-SHIELD_TO_FRONT_POWER.title: Shield To Front
YUWANCARD-SHIELD_TO_FRONT_POWER.descript: Take double damage from enemies during enemy turn.
YUWANCARD-SHIELD_TO_FRONT_POWER.smartDes: Take double damage from enemies during enemy turn. Lasts 1 turn.
YUWANCARD-SHIELD_TO_FRONT_IMMUNE_POWER.d: Take no damage from enemies during enemy turn.
YUWANCARD-SHIELD_TO_FRONT_IMMUNE_POWER.s: Take no damage from enemies during enemy turn. Lasts 1 turn.
